description: An extended rich text document: UTF-8 text plus a sorted array of facets. The text field is always readable as plain text by clients that don't understand facets. Facets are the annotation overlay.

main.description: A rich text document with text and facets.

text.description: The raw UTF-8 text content. Always valid as plain text. Blocks are separated by newline characters (\n).

facets.description: Sorted array of facets in canonical order: byteStart asc, byteEnd desc (wider first), $type of first feature lex.

facet.description: A byte-range annotation on the document's text, carrying one or more typed features.

features.description: One or more features applied to this byte range. A facet may carry multiple features (e.g., both a link and bold).

byteSlice.description: A half-open byte range [byteStart, byteEnd) into the document's UTF-8 text string.

byteStart.description: Inclusive start byte index (UTF-8 character boundary).

byteEnd.description: Exclusive end byte index (UTF-8 character boundary). byteEnd > byteStart.
